description: Slide tiles containing numbers in a grid to combine them and create a tile with the number 2048.
instructions: Use your arrow keys to move the tiles. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one!
controls: Arrow keys to shift tiles; combine similar numbers to keep the board free.
creator: Gabriele Cirulli

title: Hextris
description: High-velocity hexagonal puzzle matching. Rotate the hexagon to catch colored bricks as they fall from outer sectors.
instructions: Rotate the central hexagon to align three or more blocks of the same color to make them disappear.
controls: Left / Right Arrow keys (or A / D keys) to rotate the hexagon.
creator: Hextris Team

title: Pac-Man HTML5
description: Classic 1980 arcade maze retro game. Guide Pac-Man through a maze of dots while avoiding the four colorful ghosts.
instructions: Eat all dots in the chamber to advance to the next level. Grab glowing power pellets to temporarily eat ghosts!
controls: Arrow keys to steer Pac-Man and navigate the maze.
creator: Google Pacman Clone

title: Classic Brick Game
description: Immersive classic brick game. Complete horizontal lines of blocks to clear rows and prevent the grid from filling up.
instructions: Manage falling brick tetrominoes by rotating and aligning them to complete continuous flat lines.
controls: Left/Right arrow to shift, Up to rotate, Down for soft drop, Space for hard drop.
creator: React Tetris Team

title: T-Rex Chrome Runner
description: Run across an endless desert landscape, leaping over sharp cactus groves and pterodactyl birds.
instructions: Help the Lonely T-Rex jump or duck to avoid obstacles. Speed increases as you travel further.
controls: Spacebar or Up Arrow to Jump; Down Arrow to Duck.
creator: Chromium Team

title: Space Invaders
description: Classic space shooter where you defend the planet from descending ranks of alien invaders.
instructions: Shoot oncoming alien ships and hide behind protective bunkers as alien lasers fly down.
controls: Left / Right arrow keys to move ship; Spacebar to shoot lasers.
creator: Mariano Simone

title: Tower Building
description: A game of reflexes. Drop swinging skyscraper floors on top of each other to build the tallest, most stable tower.
instructions: Tap or click at the precise millisecond when the floor swings directly above your tower foundation.
controls: Click or press Spacebar to release and drop the swinging floor element.
creator: Youwei Zhan

title: Asteroids Classic
description: Navigate a vector spacecraft through an intense field of crashing space rocks and enemy flying saucers.
instructions: Maneuver your ship, turn to aim, fire thrusters to propel yourself, and shoot to break asteroids into tiny bits.
controls: Left / Right Arrows to turn; Up Arrow to thrust; Spacebar to shoot; Enter for hyperspace.
creator: Dr. Freeman

title: Clumsy Bird
description: Help the tiny clumsy bird flap its way past green pipes. Simple mechanics, high difficulty, addictive gameplay.
instructions: Flap your wings to stay airborne and time your climbs to match the openings between overhead and underfoot obstacles.
controls: Press Spacebar, Up Arrow, or Click to flap and elevate.
creator: Ellison Leao
